headline: SCOTUS 🎭 Grabs Trump 🍊 Birthright BDAY CITIZENSHIP BOMB 💣👶
text:
Supreme Court 🏛️🔥 SLAYS lower court CUCKS 🤡🚫 by AGREEING 👌 to HEAR Trump's 🍊 GODMODE executive order EXECUTING birthright citizenship 😤💥! First day in office 🗓️ Jan 1️⃣, Donny dropped the MIC 🎤🍆 signing EO to YEET 👋 citizenship for anchor babies 👶🛶 of illegals 🚫🇲🇽 and temp visa simps 📄😩 – but lib judges 🧑‍⚖️😭 BLOCKED it like soy boys blocking the border wall 🧱🚫!

14th Amendment 📜⚔️ from Civil War 🏰🔥 era been SLAPPING 👋 'All born on US soil 🇺🇸🌎 are CITIZENS 🦅' for 160 years 🕰️ – except diplomat daddies 👨‍💼🌍 and enemy troops 🪖😈. Trump said 'NAH FAM' 🤏🚫 to kids of illegals and H1B curry bros 🇮🇳📈, sparking FED JUDGE RAGE WAR ⚔️😡 – most CRATERED 🚫 the order as 'UNCONSTITUTIONAL' 😂📜, but appeals courts KEPT INJUNCTIONS LOCKED 🔒💪!

Trump APPEALED to SCOTUS 🦅👑 like a BOSS, and in June they OWNED lower courts: 'Y'ALL OVERSTEPPED 🖕📏' – didn't rule on the JUICY deets yet, but NOW they're DIVING IN 🏊‍♂️💦 for ORAL ARGS 🗣️🍆 between gov GOATs 🐐 and plaintiff migrant MAMAS 👩‍👧💔 with their INFANT weapons 👶😍! Ruling? Either BACK anchor baby ORGY 💦👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 or END IT like Thanos snapping illegals' papers 🫰🚫!

US 🇺🇸 one of 30 Americas squad 🌎🥇 granting AUTO-CITIZENSHIP 🍑🎂 to border-born bbs – MPI thinktank 🧠📊 + Penn State nerds 🤓 predict 255K babies/year LOSE papers 📄❌ if axed, pumping unauthorized pop by 2.7M by 2045 📈😱 and 5.4M by 2075 🕰️💥 – Trump's WALLING the WELFARE 🍑🚫 like Elon walls Twitter trolls 🐦🧱! Libs MELTING 😩💦 over 'freed slaves' 14A history 🧔‍♂️🔗 but Donny's like 'HOLD MY BIG MAC 🍔🇺🇸' – SCOTUS boutta DECIDE if birthright's a SCAM 🎰🤡 or STAYS THICC 💪🦅! MAGA MOONING 🚀🍑 as Chief Roberts 👨‍⚖️🧔 preps the VERDICT BANGER 💣‼️
